models.name: sglang
models.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

models.name: Speech
models.description: A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

models.name: local-rag
models.description: Ingest files for retrieval augmented generation (RAG) with open-source Large Language Models (LLMs), all without 3rd parties or sensitive data leaving your network.

models.name: LLMEval-Logic
models.description: LLMEval-Logic: A Solver-Verified Chinese Benchmark for Logical Reasoning of LLMs with Adversarial Hardening (80% public release; 20% private holdout)

models.name: Forgetting-A-New-Mechanism-Towards-Better-Large-Language-Model-Fine-tuning
models.description: [TMLR 2026 J2C Certification] FORGETTING: A New Mechanism Towards Better Large Language Model Fine-Tuning

models.name: md-bridge
models.description: Self-hosted document converter built on hand-written heuristics, not language models. Ships PDF ↔ Markdown; the architecture welcomes new format pairs as contributions land. Deterministic by design: same input, same output, every run. FastAPI + React, multi-arch Docker, MIT.

models.name: AI-Voice-Agent
models.description: 🗣️ Build an interactive voice agent that leverages Speech-to-Text, a Large Language Model, and Text-to-Speech for real-time voice interactions.

models.name: HowHungryisAIRepo
models.description: This repository powers the “How Hungry is AI?” dashboard and provides the code + data release accompanying our paper on inference-phase (operational) environmental footprints of LLMs.

models.name: NeuralForge
models.description: Fine-tune large language models on local hardware using a web interface with QLoRA training and GGUF export support.

models.name: ai-agent-pulse
models.description: Daily automated tracking of 19 AI agent frameworks. Pulse Score ranks momentum via star velocity, release freshness, commit activity, and community health.

models.name: MyMoMo-Academic
models.description: Autonomous Agent-Based Modeling（ABM） for research: describe a model in plain language and get a working simulation you can trust — reproduce published studies or build new ones, across any domain, on a purpose-built engine.

models.name: Neural_Memory_Operating_system
models.description: Predict large language model inference with memory prefetching and speculative decoding for faster reasoning on low VRAM hardware

models.name: llmtest-perf
models.description: Validate LLM inference performance and catch latency, throughput, and TTFT regressions before release

models.name: auto-crawl-tiktok-post-fb
models.description: Automate TikTok to Facebook posting, schedule Reels, and manage AI replies, inbox, campaigns, and workers in one dashboard

models.name: auto-hf-papers
models.description: Automate Hugging Face Daily Papers filtering and email a daily Markdown digest of the most relevant AI papers by upvotes and GitHub stars

models.name: semeai-gate-basic
models.description: Release-control gate for AI answers: SHOW / REVIEW / BLOCK before user release

models.name: NeuroLex-AI-powered-Fake-News-Detection-System
models.description: NeuroLex is an AI-powered fake news detection system that combines Natural Language Processing (NLP), Cognitive Linguistics, and Transformer-based models to analyze news content, detect misinformation, and provide explainable real-time predictions.

models.name: fake_news_detection_from_user_dataset
models.description: This project aims to detect fake news using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning techniques. It processes a dataset of news articles, cleans and vectorizes the text using TF-IDF, and classifies them as FAKE or REAL using a Logistic Regression model.

models.name: FineSteer
models.description: Implementation of FineSteer: A Unified Framework for Fine-Grained Inference-Time Steering in Large Language Models

models.name: HR-Agent-System
models.description: An AI-powered HR Assistant that automates employee support by answering HR-related queries, retrieving company policies, and streamlining HR workflows using Large Language Models (LLMs) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

models.name: AI_Research_Assistant
models.description: AI Research Assistant is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) application that allows users to upload research papers, PDFs, and documents, ask questions in natural language, and receive context-aware answers generated using Large Language Models and semantic search.

models.name: zefav
models.description: ZeFaV: Boosting Large Language Models for Zero-shot Fact Verification

models.name: LGS
models.description: Improve medical image analysis in large vision-language models by adding localization signals to standard fine-tuning targets for better spatial alignment.

models.name: RTS-LLM
models.description: Forecast time series data by restoring intrinsic temporal structures using pre-trained Large Language Models.

models.name: tessera
models.description: Distill large language models into small, efficient students using a custom stack featuring GPU kernels, sharded training, and high-performance inference.

models.name: stellar-llm-classifier
models.description: Classify stars using Gaia DR3 data by combining deterministic astrophysical rules with a fine-tuned language model for accurate spectral typing and descriptions.

models.name: OmniSIFT
models.description: Compress tokens using modality-asymmetric techniques to improve the efficiency of omni-modal large language models.

models.name: SafeWeights-ACL
models.description: Identify and intervene on safety-critical parameters in large language models to mitigate jailbreak risks without retraining.

models.name: SharedRequest
models.description: Implement privacy-preserving inference for large language models using a model-agnostic discrimination approach to secure user queries.

models.name: build_a_large_language_model
models.description: Code from Build a Large Language Model book by Sebastian Raschka

models.name: DBD-AutoGrind-Trainer-2026
models.description: Automate Dead by Daylight bloodpoint farming and unlock game content with this undetected external trainer.

models.name: supply-chain-monitor
models.description: Monitor PyPI and npm releases for supply chain threats, diff package changes, and alert on malicious updates with LLM-based analysis

models.name: vgt-auto-punisher
models.description: Detect and block network threats in Linux kernels using hybrid L4 and L7 behavioral analysis for effective intrusion prevention and response.

models.name: OnePersonCompany
models.description: Transform daily progress into structured reports, release notes, and shareable content to simplify solo or small team project management.

models.name: ChironAI
models.description: Modular RAG platform with WebUI, extension runtime, LLM proxy compatibility, and Docker-backed beta release gates.

models.name: llm-youtube-landscape-tracker
models.description: Python + Next.js pipeline for collecting YouTube transcripts, extracting LLM topics, and publishing a live, transcript-grounded dashboard that maps how channels cover LLMs, AI agents, coding assistants, model releases, benchmarks, and related developer workflows.

models.name: daily-brief
models.description: An automated personal daily briefing agent that crawls tech news sources, summarizes the top stories using a free LLM, generates an audio MP3, commits a Markdown brief to a GitHub repo, uploads the MP3 as a GitHub Release asset, and deploys a GitHub Pages web archive

models.name: safety-harness
models.description: A closed-loop safety harness for agentic LLMs: stress-test → regression → release-gate → incident-replay.

models.name: Fake-News-Detection
models.description: The Fake News Detection System is a Machine Learning project that identifies whether a news article is real or fake using Natural Language Processing techniques. It analyzes text data, processes it, and uses a trained model to make accurate predictions. This project helps in reducing misinformation and improving trust in online news.

models.name: gpt2-financial-news
models.description: GPT-style language model trained on Kaggle Financial News Headlines data

models.name: Fake-news-detection-using-GENAI-ML-DL-XAI
models.description: Multimodal Fake News Detection system leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLM), OCR, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and Explainable AI (Grad-CAM) to detect text-image inconsistency and misinformation.

models.name: Fake_News_Detector
models.description: A Machine learning model that predicts whether the uploaded news or article is fake or real by analysing with Natural Language Processor techniques.

models.name: Fake-News-Detector-using-Machine-Learning
models.description: Developed a Fake News Detection System using Machine Learning and Natural Language Processing (NLP). Built a Logistic Regression model with TF-IDF vectorization to classify news articles as Real or Fake. Designed an interactive Streamlit web application that allows users to input news content and receive predictions with confidence scores.

models.name: Fake-News-detector-miniproject
models.description: Fake News Detection (NLP Mini Project): Built a machine learning model to classify news articles as real or fake using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques such as text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF vectorization.

models.name: vision-language-model-validation
models.description: validating new vision models - open source runnable on local Macs and PCs.

models.name: news-brief-generator-A2A
models.description: An AI-driven news brief generator that fetches real-time data from multiple APIs, aggregates the data using an agent-based orchestration model, and generates a formatted article using a large language model.

models.name: EdgeDetectos
models.description: EdgeDetectos let you test new edges very fast, using a custom language with a documentation file for AI models, and check their validity by using good practices

models.name: Handwritten_Text_Generation
models.description: The IAM Sentences Dataset contains 5,663 handwritten English sentences and their corresponding text transcriptions. In this project, the text data is used to train a Character-Level RNN model capable of generating new text sequences by learning character patterns and language structures from the dataset.

models.name: Fake-News-Detection-Project
models.description: A hybrid AI-based web application that detects fake news using Natural Language Processing (NLP), machine learning models, and rule-based filtering. It provides real-time predictions with confidence scores and an interactive web interface built using Flask, HTML, and CSS.

models.name: FakeNewsMuRIL
models.description: Multilingual Fake News Detection using MuRIL Transformer Model for Indian Languages

models.name: news-agent-langchain
models.description: Command-line LangChain agent that answers natural-language questions about current events using the newsdata.io news API as a tool, with OpenAI models.
